requirement_topic.en: BPDB / Distribution Utility Grid Connection and Energisation
requirement_topic.zh: BPDB / 配电公用事业并网与送电
requirement_topic.zht: BPDB／配電公用事業併網與送電

summary.en: EV charging sites in Bangladesh need the relevant electricity distribution utility's connection, load, metering, protection, service-capacity, and energisation review. BPDB is a key Bangladesh power-sector utility, but the exact connection route depends on the site location and distribution licensee.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国电动汽车充电站需要相关配电公用事业对接入、负荷、计量、保护、供电容量和送电进行审查。BPDB是孟加拉国电力行业的重要公用事业，但准确接入路径取决于场址位置和配电持证方。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國電動汽車充電站需要相關配電公用事業對接入、負荷、計量、保護、供電容量和送電進行審查。BPDB是孟加拉國電力行業的重要公用事業，但準確接入路徑取決於場址位置和配電持證方。

standards_or_laws: BPDB or local distribution utility connection requirements
Bangladesh Electricity Grid Code / Distribution Code where applicable
Project metering, protection, and energisation approval

summary.en: China grid-connection drawings, GB/T 18487 test reports, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid design assumptions may support engineering review, but they do not approve a Bangladesh service connection or energisation.
summary.zh: 中国并网图纸、GB/T 18487测试报告以及国家电网或南方电网设计假设可支持工程审查，但不能批准孟加拉国供电接入或送电。
summary.zht: 中國併網圖紙、GB/T 18487測試報告以及國家電網或南方電網設計假設可支持工程審查，但不能批准孟加拉國供電接入或送電。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 where used for China charging-site design

gap.en: Prepare Bangladesh site single-line diagrams, maximum-demand calculations, transformer or service-capacity checks, earthing and protection coordination, meter layout, harmonic or power-quality data, and commissioning records for the local utility.
gap.zh: 应为当地公用事业准备孟加拉国场址单线图、最大需量计算、变压器或供电容量核查、接地和保护配合、计量布置、谐波或电能质量数据以及调试记录。
gap.zht: 應為當地公用事業準備孟加拉國場址單線圖、最大需量計算、變壓器或供電容量核查、接地和保護配合、計量布置、諧波或電能品質數據以及調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection and energisation where the charger site connects to a Bangladesh distribution utility
mandatory_status.cn: China utility evidence is not a Bangladesh connection approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh utility connection approval is a site-specific requirement. Product GB/T reports do not replace BPDB or distribution-utility connection, metering, and energisation review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国公用事业接入批准是场址特定要求。产品GB/T报告不能替代BPDB或配电公用事业的接入、计量和送电审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉國公用事業接入批准是場址特定要求。產品GB/T報告不能替代BPDB或配電公用事業的接入、計量和送電審查。

requirement_topic.en: EV Charging Guideline, Tariff, Metering, and Operator Controls
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车充电指南、电价、计量和运营控制
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車充電指南、電價、計量和營運控制

summary.en: Bangladesh EV charging projects should verify current Power Division, BERC, BPDB, and distribution-utility requirements for tariff category, separate metering, charging-station operation, safety signage, load management, and customer billing. BERC revised electricity tariffs in 2026 (average increase approximately 16.7%); confirm the current LT-D3 EV charging rate from the official BERC tariff order before quoting. The Power Division EV Charging Guideline makes BSTI certification mandatory for all EV charging stations. No single universally applicable EV charger product certificate replaces these site and operator controls.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国电动汽车充电项目应核实现行电力司、BERC、BPDB和配电公用事业关于电价类别、单独计量、充电站运营、安全标识、负荷管理和用户计费的要求。BERC于2026年修订了电价（平均上调约16.7%）；在引用具体数据前，应从BERC正式电价令确认当前LT-D3电动汽车充电类别的电价。电力司《电动汽车充电指南》规定所有电动汽车充电站须取得BSTI认证。没有任何单一电动汽车充电设备产品证书可取代这些场址和运营控制。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國電動汽車充電專案應核實現行電力司、BERC、BPDB和配電公用事業關於電價類別、單獨計量、充電站營運、安全標識、負荷管理和用戶計費的要求。BERC於2026年修訂了電價（平均上調約16.7%）；在引用具體數據前，應從BERC正式電價令確認當前LT-D3電動汽車充電類別的電價。電力司《電動汽車充電指南》規定所有電動汽車充電站須取得BSTI認證。沒有任何單一電動汽車充電設備產品證書可取代這些場址和營運控制。

standards_or_laws: Power Division Electric Vehicle Charging Guideline (mandatory BSTI certification for all EV charging stations)

BERC tariff and licensing framework — current tariff schedule (BERC revised electricity tariffs in 2026 with an average increase of approximately 16.7%; the LT-D3 EV charging category tariff was updated; verify the specific current Tk/kWh rate from the official BERC tariff order before quoting)
BPDB or distribution-utility metering and service rules

summary.en: China charger product certification, GB/T test reports, and Chinese billing or backend software evidence do not establish Bangladesh tariff eligibility, meter configuration, operator permissions, or public-charging billing compliance.
summary.zh: 中国充电设备产品认证、GB/T测试报告以及中国计费或后台软件证据不能证明孟加拉国电价资格、计量配置、运营许可或公共充电计费合规。
summary.zht: 中國充電設備產品認證、GB/T測試報告以及中國計費或後台軟體證據不能證明孟加拉國電價資格、計量配置、營運許可或公共充電計費合規。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EV charging infrastructure policy

gap.en: Confirm the current charging-station guideline and tariff path before commercial operation. Localise user notices, emergency instructions, price display, meter records, operator logs, and backend billing records to Bangladesh project requirements.
gap.zh: 商业运营前应确认现行充电站指南和电价路径。应按照孟加拉国项目要求本地化用户提示、应急说明、价格显示、计量记录、运营日志和后台计费记录。
gap.zht: 商業營運前應確認現行充電站指南和電價路徑。應按照孟加拉國專案要求本地化用戶提示、應急說明、價格顯示、計量記錄、營運日誌和後台計費記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Bangladesh tariff, licensing, utility service, consumer-billing, or public charging-station rules apply to the operator or site
mandatory_status.cn: China product and software evidence is not Bangladesh tariff, metering, or operator approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Public charging in Bangladesh should be checked as a product, site, tariff, meter, and operator-control package; do not reduce it to a China GB/T product file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国公共充电应作为产品、场址、电价、计量和运营控制资料包核查；不应简化为中国GB/T产品文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉國公共充電應作為產品、場址、電價、計量和營運控制資料包核查；不應簡化為中國GB/T產品文件。
